evals.name: login-and-check-inventory
evals.prompt: Start a new MUD game session with the character queen/password, then check the inventory
evals.expected_output: Session initialized with parsed inventory showing items and weight

evals.name: movement-sequence
evals.prompt: Using the active session from the previous test, move north to a new room, then move south back to the original room. After each movement, report the room name and available exits.
evals.expected_output: Two successful movement commands with parsed room data (exits, NPCs, items)

evals.name: error-handling
evals.prompt: Try to move in an invalid direction (like 'northwest') and try to execute an invalid command (like 'cast nonexistent_spell'). Verify that errors are handled gracefully with meaningful error messages.
evals.expected_output: Two error responses with success: false and clear error messages
